name: weaviate-mcp
description: Weaviate vector DB — hybrid (vector + BM25 + filter) search, schema-driven classes, modular vectorisers; self-host or cloud.

auth.credential_source: Weaviate Cloud Console or self-hosted instance bearer.

tools.name: vector_authenticate
tools.description: Store Weaviate endpoint URL + API key.

tools.name: vector_create_collection
tools.description: Create a class with property schema + vectoriser.

tools.name: vector_delete_collection
tools.description: Delete a class and all its objects.

tools.name: vector_upsert
tools.description: Insert/update objects; vectoriser computes embedding if not provided.

tools.name: vector_query
tools.description: Hybrid (vector + BM25 + filter) search. Set alpha to weight vector vs BM25.

tools.name: vector_delete
tools.description: Delete objects by id or where-filter.
